end end b=#p return u(X)end,function(z,k)local u=e(k)local N=function(N,r,p,V,X)return b(z,{N,r;p;V;X},k,u)end return N end,function(z)for k=-396048-(-396049),#z,218537-218536 do s[z[k]]=(417522-417521)+s[z[k]]end if N then local b=N(true)local u=p(b)u[k(491660+-474806)],u[k(549234+-532450)],u[k(840798+-823901)]=z,d,function()return 3889986-986846 end return b else return r({},{[k(-904642+921426)]=d,[k(-185332-(-202186))]=z;[k(901418-884521)]=function()return-247607+3150747 end})end end,function(z,k)local u=e(k)local N=function(...)return b(z,{...},k,u)end return N end,function(z,k)local u=e(k)local N=function(N,r,p)return b(z,{N,r,p},k,u)end return N end return(D(522025+1055226,{}))(u(X))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[k(920323-903453)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
